description: Card record schema for The Hard Win. One JSON file per candidate person, captured during research. A human approves before anything posts. The canonical template is ../worked_example.json (Toni Morrison).

fields.hook: Headline. Plain, calm, true. No hype, no emojis.
fields.copy_today: One concrete action drawn from the person's REAL constraint (not a generic platitude).
fields.receipt: The source line shown on the card (mono, bottom): name the work + the 2+ confirming sources in plain words.
fields.sources: Array of >= 2 independent reputable source strings (e.g. 'Encyclopaedia Britannica - Toni Morrison', 'Howard University archive'). Stays in this file as the audit trail; the posts table has no sources column.
fields.image_credit: Credit string if an image is used, else empty. Never Getty/Bettmann/agency images sold as free.
fields.caption: Instagram caption (hashtags allowed; not drawn on the card).
fields.palette: teal | navy | plum | violet | forest | black. Assigned by rotation so the feed never repeats two days running.
fields.status: pending (drafts only) | cut (removed; needs cut_reason). Scripts never set 'approved' or 'posted'.
fields.cut_reason: If status=cut: why it was dropped (e.g. central claim contested/unratified).

hard_rules_enforced_by_validate: no quote-mill / pirate / agency-image sources (brainyquote, azquotes, pinterest, wikiquote, sci-hub, libgen, getty, bettmann)
no emojis in card text fields
palette must be one the locked renderer accepts
status must be 'pending' to load; 'cut' records are logged, never loaded
